text: Yifan predicts RoPE will no longer be used in large language models but will be retained in multimodal components. The post quotes his Group Representational Position Encoding work with Jane Street blog and ArXiv links.

Yifan shares a Jane Street blog about recent work: Group Representational Position Encoding. Links include blog.janestreet.com/using-group-theory-to-explore-positional-encodings-attention and ArXiv arxiv.org/abs/2512.07805.

Yifan says Grok is back, quoting Artificial Analysis on xAI Grok 4.3: Intelligence Index 53, improved agentic performance, around 40% lower input price and 60% lower output price than Grok 4.20, placing xAI above Muse Spark and Claude Sonnet 4.6 on the chart.
